data.description: As two major countries, China and the United States should respect each other, and pursue peaceful coexistence and win-win cooperation, a Chinese spokesman said on Wednesday. Lou Qinjian, spokesman for the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress (NPC), made the

data.title: Unite.ai's TruthScan named "Most accurate AI image detector" by reviewer, Janine Heinrichs, on Feb 26, 2026.
data.description: In Sheridan, Wyoming on March 4, 2026, Unite.ai, a media outlet focused on artificial intelligence, released a detailed assessment of TruthScan on February 26, 2026. According to reviewer Janine Heinrichs, TruthScan emerged as the most precise deepfake identification tool she had tested. The review highlighted numerous instances demonstrating the efficacy of the technology.

data.title: Dr. Bill Winston to host "The Blessing: Anointed for Business" conference on March 20-21 in Forest Park, Illinois.
data.description: Entrepreneurs, CEOs, investors, and faith-driven leaders are set to convene in Forest Park, Illinois on March 20-21 for "The Blessing: Anointed for Business" event. The gathering is organized by Dr. Bill Winston, a renowned global faith leader, entrepreneur, and the founder of Joseph Business School. This event is anticipated to attract a significant number of participants from around the world eager to explore the intersection of faith and business.

data.title: CPOs lead procurement transformation with focus on AI, talent, and risk. Research by ProcureCon Insights shows strategic growth.
data.description: According to a recent study by ProcureCon Insights, procurement executives are increasingly focusing on enhancing their strategic influence and are placing emphasis on automation, collaboration with suppliers, and acquiring digital talent. The research, conducted by a 365-demand generation partner, revealed that in 2026, these leaders are prioritizing these areas to drive business growth. This information was announced today in New York on March 4.

data.title: BMNT and OpenTeams partner to expedite AI adoption in government, offering AI solutions within days.
data.description: A recent collaboration between BMNT, a government innovation company, and OpenTeams, the engineering force behind widely used AI and data technologies, has resulted in the rapid development of functional AI solutions to address validated government requirements. This partnership, announced on March 4, 2026, has significantly decreased the timeframe for delivering AI capabilities from months to just a few days. The success of this initiative highlights the efficiency and effectiveness of combining expertise from different sectors to meet pressing government needs.

data.title: HSL LABS forms panel of top plastic surgeons to improve post-surgical recovery. New initiative to boost standards.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, HSL LABS made a significant announcement regarding the establishment of a Professional Advisory Board comprised of leading plastic and reconstructive surgeons. This initiative aims to enhance post-operative healing support standards. The distinguished cohort of surgeons will provide expertise and guidance in this critical area. This notable development reinforces HSL LABS' commitment to ensuring excellence in patient care.

data.title: LPA sets reporting dates for Full-Year 2025 financial results: Earnings Release - March 18, 2026; Conference Call - March 19, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. ET | 8:00 a.m. CT.
data.description: Logistic Properties of the Americas (LPA), a top developer, owner, and manager of high-quality industrial real estate in Central and South America listed on NYSE American with the ticker symbol LPA, shared its schedule for reporting Full-Year 2025 financial results. The Earnings Release is set for Wednesday, March 18, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, there will be a Conference Call on Thursday, March 19, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET or 8:00 a.m. CT for interested parties to join.

data.title: Olenox Industries reports positive field data in Wichita County, Texas with production expected to meet or surpass BOE/day target.
data.description: A field in Wichita County, Texas is projected to rapidly achieve or surpass its target of producing barrels of oil equivalent per day.

data.title: Intech ETFs celebrate 1st year with $250 million in assets under management. Marked by success in market concentration.
data.description: Intech, located in West Palm Beach, Florida, disclosed today that their collection of exchange-traded funds now has over $250 million in total assets under management. This marks a noteworthy achievement for Intech, with the Intech S&P Large Cap Diversified Alpha ETF (LDGX) and the Intech S&P...

data.title: Navigate360 selected as Preferred Vendor by NCEA, offers exclusive pricing and safety solutions to Catholic schools.
data.description: Navigate360, a leading provider of school safety solutions, is now a Preferred Vendor and Corporate Partner, offering exclusive pricing and integrated safety solutions to Catholic schools. These tailored solutions help in protecting students, improving operational efficiency, and managing resources effectively. This collaboration, announced on March 4, 2026 in Richfield, Ohio, aims to enhance safety measures within schools. This strategic partnership underscores the commitment to safeguarding students and optimizing resources in a more cost-effective manner.

data.title: Over 300 TAG seals awarded to 196 companies worldwide for achieving 2026 certifications in ad industry.
data.description: 196 companies in various sectors including fraud, brand safety, malvertising, and transparency have been awarded over 300 TAG Seals by TAG (Trustworthy Accountability Group). This program aims to enhance safety and transparency in digital advertising. The awarding ceremony took place in Washington on March 4, 2026.

data.title: TransnetBW implements Prisma Photonics' AI-driven technology to evaluate dynamic line rating on 3 power circuits. PrismaPower™ deployed on 120km supports Germany's energy transition and grid flexibility goals.
data.description: Prisma Photonics, an innovative company specializing in grid monitoring technology utilizing advanced optical fiber sensing, has revealed the deployment of their PrismaPower™ technology across a significant stretch of 120 kilometers in Germany. This initiative plays a crucial role in supporting Germany's transition towards renewable energy sources and achieving its grid flexibility objectives. The deployment will contribute to enhancing the efficiency and reliability of the energy grid in the region.

data.title: Mamava and SimpliFed partner to offer virtual lactation support via app on IBCLC Day. Expansion of access to services.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Burlington, Vermont, Mamava, a company known for their freestanding lactation pods, and SimpliFed, a top telelactation provider, revealed a new collaboration to commemorate International Board Certified Lactation Consultant Day. This partnership signifies a significant development in maternal health, with Mamava's expertise in lactation spaces combined with SimpliFed's remote lactation services to enhance support for breastfeeding mothers. The announcement coincided with IBCLC Day, highlighting the importance of professional lactation support.

data.title: Brandi Webb relaunches Yet 2 Evolve Productions as a social impact video production company focusing on transparency and integrity. They provide short-form video production for nonprofits, advocacy initiatives, and purpose-driven brands in NYC, Atlanta, and Charlotte.
data.description: A video production company offers short-form videos for nonprofits, advocacy initiatives, and purpose-driven brands. They provide cinematic storytelling, transparent pricing, and collaborative production support to clients in New York City, Atlanta, Charlotte, and nationwide.

data.title: TheWell Bioscience introduces RocketCell™ hMSC Xeno-Free Growth Medium for Human Mesenchymal Stem Cells.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Monmouth Junction, New Jersey, TheWell Bioscience unveiled RocketCell™ hMSC Xeno-Free Complete Growth Medium. This innovative product is a chemically defined, xeno-free medium tailored for superior performance in cell culture. The launch signifies a breakthrough for the company, known for its cutting-edge technologies in this field.

data.title: Liberty HealthShare is offering up to $50,000 for Stark County pediatric wellness support through Sharing Hearts Fund.
data.description: CANTON, Ohio - As of March 4, 2026, Liberty HealthShare® is accepting applications for the Sharing Hearts Fund for Pediatric Wellness in Stark County. Through May 15, interested parties can apply for support, with grants of up to $50,000 available. This charitable initiative aims to provide assistance to pediatric wellness programs in the area.

data.title: Consumers trust AI for travel planning the most among common tasks - survey of 1,000 consumers by Matador Network.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by travel publisher Matador Network in San Francisco, on more than 1,000 consumers, revealed that individuals express greater confidence in generative AI for travel planning compared to other routine tasks. The study, conducted on March 4, 2026, also found that respondents were more inclined to trust this technology in aiding their travel arrangements.

data.title: A-MAX Insurance acquires Best Buy Insurance in Arizona, their first expansion there. Best Buy founded in 1996.
data.description: A new development was disclosed by A-MAX Insurance on March 4, 2026, revealing their acquisition of Best Buy Insurance, an established agency from Arizona established in 1996. This move signifies A-MAX's initial venture into the Arizona market, emphasizing their latest milestone in organizational growth.
